title: Task 2: Build Script for Materialized Tables

inputs.description: Follow Task 2 in the plan exactly. Create scripts/network/__init__.py, scripts/network/build_network_tables.py, tests/scripts/network/__init__.py, and tests/scripts/network/test_build_network_tables.py. The build script materializes network_edges (from wikipedia_connections + teacher/student + co-publication) and network_agents (with place assignment, display_name fallback chain, connection counts). Use the EXACT code from the plan. Run tests: poetry run pytest tests/scripts/network/test_build_network_tables.py -v. All tests must pass. Then git add and commit.
